intent: Decouple governed projects from the public AI Builder OS monorepo. Support embedded showcases, OS-created standalone GitHub repositories, and attached repositories with independent public/private visibility and ownership. Keep canonical product truth inside each project repository, runtime state outside Git, and preserve Codex-native workflow access. Migrate Wright Sparks to a private standalone repository while keeping its production website stable, and retain only an explicitly sanitized showcase in AI Builder OS.

summary: Implemented stable multi-repository project identity, private runtime registry, repository-aware controller and UI, approval-gated GitHub operations, reusable Codex plugin, tests, private Wright Sparks migration, durable Vercel Git integration, and sanitized public showcase.
